description: Submit order transaction via Commerce Hub Orders API. Supports card payments, alternative payment methods (APMs), wallet-based flows, and redirect-based checkout interactions.

Content-Type.description: Media type of the request body

Client-Request-Id.description: UUID for request tracking and idempotency

Api-Key.description: Merchant API key obtained from the Developer Portal

Authorization.description: Authorization header value corresponding to Auth-Token-Type

order.description: Top-level order object containing intent, status, and payment method details

paymentMethod.description: Payment method associated with the order

walletType.description: Wallet provider when sourceType is a wallet

checkoutInteractions.description: Controls the checkout interaction flow including redirects, QR codes, and return URLs. Critical for APM redirect-based flows.

actions.description: Actions the consumer must take to complete payment

code.description: QR code or one-time code for the consumer

successUrl.description: URL to redirect consumer on successful payment

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect consumer on cancelled payment

terminalLaneNumber.description: Terminal lane number for multi-lane environments

useCase.description: Use case identifier for the transaction

merchantPartner.description: Partner or integrator details associated with the merchant

transactionDetails.description: Detailed transaction parameters including capture flags, tokenization, and device fingerprinting

captureFlag.description: false for authorization only, true for immediate capture

deviceFingerprint.description: Device fingerprint data for fraud detection

physicalGoodsIndicator.description: Indicates whether physical goods are involved

createToken.description: Request token creation for the payment method

partialApproval.description: Allow partial approval of the transaction amount

transactionProcessingDetails.description: Processing metadata assigned by the gateway for transaction tracking

apiKey.description: API key used for the request

referenceTransactionDetails.description: References to prior transactions for follow-on operations such as captures, voids, and refunds

referenceTransactionId.description: Reference to a prior gateway transaction ID

referenceMerchantTransactionId.description: Reference to a prior merchant transaction ID

referenceMerchantOrderId.description: Reference to a prior merchant order ID

referenceOrderId.description: Reference to a prior gateway order ID

referenceClientRequestId.description: Reference to a prior client request ID

recipientNameOrAddress.description: Recipient name or secondary address line

amountComponents.description: Itemized breakdown of the transaction amount including taxes, surcharges, and adjustments

priceAdjustments.description: Price adjustments such as discounts or markups

orderData.description: Order-level metadata including line items, dates, and service type

itemCount.description: Number of items in the order

reOrder.description: Indicates a re-order of previously purchased items

giftcardCount.description: Number of gift cards in the order

itemDetails.description: Line item details for the order

amountComponents.description: Item-level amount breakdown (same structure as top-level amountComponents)

taxAmounts.description: Item-level tax breakdown (same structure as amountComponents.taxAmounts)

phone.description: Billing phone numbers (same structure as customer.phone)

dynamicDescriptors.description: Dynamic statement descriptor fields that appear on the consumer's statement

encryptionData.description: Point-to-point encryption (P2PE) data for encrypted payment instruments

encryptionBlockFields.description: Fields contained in the encryption block

splitShipment.description: Split shipment details for multi-shipment orders

totalCount.description: Total number of shipments in the split

finalShipment.description: Indicates this is the final shipment

subMerchantId.description: Sub-merchant identifier for payment facilitator models

gatewayResponse.description: Top-level gateway response containing transaction state and processing details

apiKey.description: API key used for the request

order.description: Order details echoed in the response with additional provider-assigned identifiers

paymentMethod.description: Payment method echoed in the response (same structure as request)

checkoutInteractions.description: Checkout interaction details echoed in the response including redirect URLs and action codes

paymentReceipt.description: Payment receipt with approved amounts and processor response details

merchantDetails.description: Merchant details echoed back in the response
